name: Tiramisu (6)
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk egg yolks, sugar, and Marsala in a large metal bowl until well blended.
2. Set the bowl over a saucepan of simmering water (do not allow water to touch the bottom of the bowl). Mix with an electric mixer until the mixture triples in volume, about 5 minutes.
3. Cover and refrigerate the zabaglone until it is well chilled. This can be prepared up to 2 days ahead.
4. In a large bowl, whip mascarpone with cream and sugar until soft peaks form.
5. Gently fold the whipped mixture into the mascarpone.
6. Fold in the chilled zabaglone.
7. Refrigerate until well chilled, about 3 hours.
8. Combine Espresso coffee, rum, sugar, and vanilla extract in a small bowl.
9. Brush both sides of cake squares with this mixture.
10. Place a generous spoonful of mascarpone mixture at the bottom of each wineglass.
11. Set the cake square into each glass at an angle.
12. Top with the remaining mascarpone mixture.
13. Sprinkle shaved chocolate and ground Espresso coffee over the desserts.
14. Refrigerate until chilled for at least 30 minutes, up to 3 hours.
